instructions.instruction: Use AccessorySetupKit for privacy-preserving Bluetooth and Wi-Fi accessory discovery and authorization, then use CoreBluetooth or NetworkExtension only after setup for communication.
instructions.original_snippets: Privacy-preserving accessory discovery and setup for Bluetooth and Wi-Fi devices... After setup, apps continue using CoreBluetooth and NetworkExtension for communication.
instructions.relevant_when: When designing accessory onboarding for Bluetooth or Wi-Fi devices on iOS/iPadOS.

instructions.instruction: Add NSAccessorySetupSupports with Bluetooth and/or WiFi, plus matching Bluetooth service/name/company identifier keys for Bluetooth discovery.
instructions.original_snippets: Add these keys to the app's Info.plist... NSAccessorySetupSupports... NSAccessorySetupBluetoothServices... NSAccessorySetupBluetoothNames... NSAccessorySetupBluetoothCompanyIdentifiers
instructions.relevant_when: When configuring an app target for AccessorySetupKit discovery.

instructions.instruction: Keep Bluetooth descriptor values aligned with Info.plist declarations; undeclared identifiers, names, or services crash during AccessorySetupKit discovery.
instructions.original_snippets: The Bluetooth-specific keys must match the values used in ASDiscoveryDescriptor... app crashes during AccessorySetupKit discovery.
instructions.relevant_when: When writing or reviewing ASDiscoveryDescriptor and plist setup.

instructions.instruction: A Bluetooth descriptor needs at least bluetoothCompanyIdentifier or bluetoothServiceUUID; name substring, manufacturer data, and service data are narrower matchers with dependencies.
instructions.original_snippets: A Bluetooth descriptor needs at least one of bluetoothCompanyIdentifier or bluetoothServiceUUID. Add narrower matchers as needed...

instructions.instruction: Manufacturer data blob and mask require a company identifier and matching lengths; service data blob and mask require a service UUID and matching lengths.
instructions.original_snippets: bluetoothManufacturerDataBlob and bluetoothManufacturerDataMask with a company identifier... bluetoothServiceDataBlob and bluetoothServiceDataMask with a service UUID...
instructions.relevant_when: When matching Bluetooth accessories by manufacturer data or service data.

instructions.instruction: For Wi-Fi descriptors, supply either ssid or ssidPrefix, not both, and include WiFi support in NSAccessorySetupSupports.
instructions.original_snippets: Supply either ssid or ssidPrefix, not both... For Wi-Fi accessories, include WiFi in NSAccessorySetupSupports...

instructions.instruction: Create and activate ASAccessorySession, wait for .activated before reading session.accessories or presenting the picker, and handle events with @unknown default.
instructions.original_snippets: Create and activate an ASAccessorySession... Wait for .activated before reading session.accessories or presenting the picker... @unknown default
instructions.relevant_when: When implementing the AccessorySetupKit session lifecycle.

instructions.instruction: Use ASPickerDisplayItem with name, product image, and descriptor; present picker from explicit user action.
instructions.original_snippets: Create ASPickerDisplayItem instances with a name, product image, and discovery descriptor... DON'T: Show the picker without user intent

instructions.instruction: When continuing setup UI, store the accessory from .accessoryAdded and act after .pickerDidDismiss.
instructions.original_snippets: When the user selects an accessory, .accessoryAdded fires before .pickerDidDismiss... store the accessory on the first event and act on it after dismissal
instructions.relevant_when: When app-side setup continues after the system picker closes.

instructions.instruction: Use ASAccessory.bluetoothIdentifier with CoreBluetooth after selection; CoreBluetooth scans only return paired AccessorySetupKit accessories and no broad Bluetooth prompt is needed when using AccessorySetupKit exclusively.
instructions.original_snippets: After an accessory is added via the picker, use CoreBluetooth... bluetoothIdentifier... No NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription is needed when using AccessorySetupKit exclusively
instructions.relevant_when: When connecting to a selected Bluetooth accessory after setup.

instructions.instruction: Use ASAccessory.ssid with NEHotspotConfiguration for Wi-Fi accessories after selection.
instructions.original_snippets: For Wi-Fi accessories, the ssid on the ASAccessory identifies the network. Use NEHotspotConfiguration...
instructions.relevant_when: When connecting to a selected Wi-Fi accessory after setup.

instructions.instruction: For migration, use ASMigrationDisplayItem, do not initialize CBCentralManager before migration completes, and wait for .migrationComplete.
instructions.original_snippets: Apps with existing CoreBluetooth-authorized accessories can migrate... Do not initialize CBCentralManager before migration completes... .migrationComplete
instructions.relevant_when: When migrating existing CoreBluetooth-authorized accessories to AccessorySetupKit.

instructions.instruction: Keep HomeKit/Matter, general CoreBluetooth implementation, and general NetworkExtension guidance outside AccessorySetupKit except for post-setup handoff boundaries.
instructions.original_snippets: After setup, apps continue using CoreBluetooth and NetworkExtension for communication. AccessorySetupKit handles only the discovery and authorization step.
instructions.relevant_when: When a task overlaps adjacent Apple accessory domains.

instructions.instruction: Custom filtering uses ASPickerDisplaySettings on iOS 26+ and ASDiscoveredAccessory, ASDiscoveredDisplayItem, updatePicker, and finishPickerDiscovery on iOS 26.1+.
instructions.original_snippets: use custom filtering with ASPickerDisplaySettings on iOS 26+... requires ASDiscoveredAccessory, ASDiscoveredDisplayItem, updatePicker, and finishPickerDiscovery on iOS 26.1+
instructions.relevant_when: When filtering discovered accessories using advertisement data before showing picker results.
